message:
chore: update issue tracker and prune tokio guardrail policy

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Add new issue entries for connector V3 readiness work covering
  Amplitude, PostHog, Roam, Feishu, and new connector scaffolds.
- Update status on completed issues.

.config/asupersync/tokio_exception_ledger.json:
- Remove resolved tokio-compat exception entries for crates that have
  completed migration (fcp-host, fcp-graphql, discord, fwc, etc.).
- Prune stale exception records as the zero-tolerance guardrail policy
  now applies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
